title: LEGO Star Wars 75441 Venator-Class Attack Cruiser Building Set for Adults - Republic Starship Model Kit - Living Room & Shelf Decor - Collectible Gift for Revenge of the Sith Fans
features: STARSHIP MODEL BUILDING KIT – Create and display a mid-scale model of an iconic starship with LEGO Star Wars Venator-Class Attack Cruiser building set for adult fans of Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith
AUTHENTIC DETAILS – Capture the streamlined silhouette and distinctive markings of the Republic Venator-Class Attack Cruiser starship using uniquely coloured LEGO bricks
DESIGNED FOR DISPLAY – Showcase your creation on the stand with a nameplate, and lift off the top section to reveal the hangar bay for an impressive home or office piece
BUILD YOUR COLLECTION – This set is part of a collectible series featuring mid-scale buildable models of Star Wars starships, designed to be displayed alongside other iconic vehicles of the saga
STAR WARS GIFT – This model kit makes a fun treat for yourself or a great gift for an adult fan of the prequel trilogy who loves cool Star Wars memorabilia
3D BUILDING INSTRUCTIONS – With the LEGO Builder app you can build your construction models using 3D instructions, track your progress and save all your sets within the app
FROM A GALAXY FAR, FAR AWAY TO YOUR HOME – LEGO Star Wars collectible sets for adults are designed for people who enjoy hands-on creative activities to relax and recharge
description: From the manufacturer Star Wars gift for adult fans Build nostalgia for an iconic starship Relive Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith scenes as you build of one of the Galactic Republic’s most versatile starships, used for battle and to transport starfighters, troopers and cargo. Stunning brick-built model Revel in the authentic details Enjoy quality time building this mid-scale construction model, using LEGO bricks to capture the distinctive markings and unmistakable streamlined silhouette of the Venator -Class Attack Cruiser. Star Wars decor Made for display This building set is part of the of the LEGO Star Wars Starship Collection. Place your creation on the brick-built stand with a nameplate to complete an impressive centrepiece for any home or office. The joy of building A complex, rewarding build Be transported to a galaxy far, far away as you immerse yourself in this hands-on activity for adults, using 3D instructions available on the LEGO Builder app to enhance your creative experience. LEGO Star Wars collectibles Build your collection This build-and-display model complements other highly detailed LEGO Star Wars sets for adults (each sold separately), including an AT-AT (75440) under attack by a snowspeeder during the Battle of Hoth.

specifications_table.Manufacturer Warranty Description: If your new LEGO set is missing parts or has faulty parts, LEGO System A/S will replace these parts free of charge through our Bricks & Pieces service. We strive to make this free replacement available in all countries, but reserve the right to change the availability of the Bricks & Pieces service at any time without prior notice.
